name: date-picker
description: An accessible calendar date-input with a floating month-grid dialog (WAI-ARIA APG date-picker pattern); keyboard-navigable grid, positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
docs: Register <lv-date-picker> by importing components/ui/date-picker.ts from your entry point. Bind `value` to an ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Listen for `lv-change` to receive the selected date string.
